# Agent initiatives

- **Owner surfaces:** [/00_inbox/](/00_inbox/), [/01_capture/](/01_capture/), [/02_distill/cards/](/02_distill/cards/), [/02_distill/threads/](/02_distill/threads/)

00_inbox/2026-03-23__hn-vibe-coding-spam.md:5:Source URL: https://tedium.co/2026/02/25/vibe-coded-email-spam/
00_inbox/2026-03-23__hn-vibe-coding-spam.md:11:The HN thread adds a few angles. Some people say the deeper issue is weak incentives in free email systems, not AI alone. Others point out that attackers can copy real branded emails instead of generating new ones, which means the problem is not only generation quality but also distribution and filtering.
